values: error[0]=Error while reading MorseRunner.ini file.Invalid Keyword Value: 'SerialNrMidContest=bad':Error: 'bad' is an invalid range.Expecting min-max values with up to 4-digits each (e.g. 100-300).Please correct this keyword or remove the MorseRunner.ini file.

error[1]=Error while reading MorseRunner.ini file.Invalid Keyword Value: 'SerialNrEndContest=10000-10001':Error: '10000-10001' is an invalid range.Expecting range values to be less than or equal to 9999.Please correct this keyword or remove the MorseRunner.ini file.

error[2]=Error while reading MorseRunner.ini file.Invalid Keyword Value: 'SerialNrCustomRange=99-1':Error: '99-1' is an invalid range.Expecting Min value to be less than Max value.Please correct this keyword or remove the MorseRunner.ini file.
